google.formatted_address: Left Side, 519 N Market St, Wilmington, DE 19801, USA

samples.author: Isander Rodriguez
samples.text:
We went to The Quoin Restaurant for their Valentine’s Day dinner and had a great experience. The atmosphere was relaxed and intimate without feeling overdone.

The food really stood out. The shrimp dish was perfectly cooked with a flavorful sauce, and the steak was tender and well seasoned. Both desserts, the chocolate cake and the cheesecake, were excellent and nicely presented. I will definitely come back for the cheesecake.

Service was attentive and professional throughout the evening. Overall, a place we would definitely return to.

samples.author: John Enright
samples.text: Lovely solo dinner. My server, Eileen, was expertly aware of the food and wine menu. Everyone was helpful in accommodating my diet needs. The radicchio was marinated perfectly, in a way that reduced its bitterness. Might I suggest adding another green veg (or two) as a side dish? I didn’t want polenta or potatoes with my pasta. That seemed like too much starch. Still a bit hungry,  I ordered dessert, which made me realize, potatoes would have been healthier LOL.

samples.author: Matt Kapa
samples.text:
The rooftop bar at The Quoin is such a great spot. Beautiful space, relaxed but elevated vibe, and a perfect place to spend an evening.

The drinks really shine here. The espresso martini made with Buffalo Trace was smooth, rich, and balanced, easily one of the better ones I’ve had. The Harvest Spritz was refreshing and light, perfect for sipping while taking in the rooftop atmosphere. The old fashioned is always a solid choice too, well made and consistent. Even grabbing a Peroni felt right for the setting.

Great views, great cocktails, and an atmosphere that makes you want to stay a while. Definitely a go to rooftop spot in Wilmington.

samples.author: El
samples.text: The food at this restaurant is truly delicious. Both the day lunch shift and the dinner shift chefs prepare outstanding dishes. I especially recommend trying the Confit Pork Shank and the Robuchon mashed potatoes - they are exceptional. Also, a special thank you for including French champagne Moët and beautiful French rosé from Provence on the menu.

samples.author: Kika k
samples.text: Brought my friend to dinner to one of my favorite places on market st! Tried a few things off the new menu everything was absolutely delicious. Brandon was a delight and very helpful with any questions we had. Kevin checked in on us and was very helpful with our decision on our steak and desserts decisions.
